svg.metadata: { "generator": "3Dto2D BMPTrace FLUX gradient layer test", "source": "sample.png", "machineProfile": "FLUX 30W", "layerCount": 5, "outputMode": "trace", "traceSettings": { "workflow": "bitmap-trace-multiple-scan-grayscale", "traceMode": "grayscale", "scans": 5, "smooth": true, "removeBackground": true, "speckles": 2, "smoothCorners": 1, "optimize": 0.2 }, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "powerRangePercent": [ 8, 40 ], "note": "Suggested settings only. Calibrate in Beam Studio with real material before production.", "layers": [ { "layer": "L01", "tone": "lightest", "color": "#b3b3b3", "powerPercent": 8, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "estimatedWatts": 2.4 }, { "layer": "L02", "tone": "tone_02", "color": "#939393", "powerPercent": 16, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "estimatedWatts": 4.8 }, { "layer": "L03", "tone": "tone_03", "color": "#6e6e6e", "powerPercent": 24, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "estimatedWatts": 7.2 }, { "layer": "L04", "tone": "tone_04", "color": "#4e4e4e", "powerPercent": 32, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "estimatedWatts": 9.6 }, { "layer": "L05", "tone": "darkest", "color": "#1d1d1d", "powerPercent": 40, "speedMmPerSec": 100, "estimatedWatts": 12 } ] }
svg.desc: Beam Studio friendly grayscale SVG: 5 grayscale trace layers, profile FLUX 30W, 8% to 40%.
